## Notable Characteristics

- **No exercise titles** - exercises must be matched by category/name codes alone
- **No weight data** - bodyweight/cardio exercises
- **High rep counts** (up to 114) suggest timed reps, not traditional strength
- **Mixed exercise categories** - spans categories 2, 14, 18, 23, 24, 30
- **Repeated exercise** - cat=23/name=222 appears 4 times consecutively (sets 11-17), good for grouping logic
- **Repeated cat=30** with different names (96, 97) - tests grouping by full category:name key

## Test Value

Good for testing: exercise grouping with no title data, HIIT activity type mapping, bodyweight exercise detection, and consecutive-set-of-same-exercise grouping.
